# content_items.csv

**Generated by:** [`map_solutions_connectors_tables.py`](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md)
**Granularity:** One row per content item (analytic rule, hunting query, playbook, workbook, parser, watchlist, summary rule)
**Type:** Entity table

## Overview

All content items found in `Solutions/` and at the top-level content directories (`Detections/`, `Hunting Queries/`, `Workbooks/`, `Playbooks/`, `Summary rules/`, `Watchlists/`). Each item is classified by source (Solution / Standalone / GitHub Only), enriched with MITRE ATT&CK tags, query analysis (filter fields, vendor/product), and connector associations for standalone items.

## Use Cases

- **Content inventory** — list every analytic rule / hunting query / workbook / playbook / parser / watchlist / summary rule across solutions and the legacy top-level content directories.
- **Source classification** — distinguish content shipped in solution packages (`Solution`) from community content (`Standalone`) and unclassified legacy content (`GitHub Only`) via `content_source`.
- **MITRE ATT&CK reporting** — group by `content_tactics` / `content_techniques`.
- **Selection-criteria analysis** — `content_filter_fields` shows the data this content item is filtering on (same format as `connectors.csv` and `parsers.csv`).
- **Connector association** — for Standalone / GitHub Only items, `associated_connectors` and `associated_solutions` show which connectors provide the data this content needs (computed via shared tables + filter-field subset matching).
- **Required connector validation** — compare `content_required_connectors` (declared) with `associated_connectors` (computed) to find mismatches.
- **Discovered content** — `not_in_solution_json == true` flags content found by file scan that isn't listed in the Solution JSON (data hygiene check).
- **Severity / status filtering** — for analytics rules.
- **Kusto upload** — uploaded as `solution_analyzer_content_items_lookup` by `upload_to_kusto.py`.

## Columns

| Column | Description | Data Source |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| `content_id` | Unique identifier (GUID) | Content file `id` field |
| `content_name` | Display name | Content file `name` field |
| `content_type` | `analytic_rule`, `hunting_query`, `playbook`, `workbook`, `parser`, `watchlist`, `summary_rule` | Inferred from file location/structure |
| `content_description` | Description | Content file `description` field |
| `content_file` | Source filename | File system |
| `content_readme_file` | Path to associated README (if exists) | File system |
| `content_severity` | `High`/`Medium`/`Low`/`Informational` (analytics rules) | Content file `severity` |
| `content_status` | Status field | Content file `status` |
| `content_kind` | Kind/type | Content file `kind` |
| `content_tactics` | MITRE ATT&CK tactics (comma-separated) | Content file `tactics` |
| `content_techniques` | MITRE ATT&CK techniques (comma-separated) | Content file `techniques` |
| `content_required_connectors` | Required data connectors (declared) | Content file `requiredDataConnectors` |
| `content_query_status` | `has_query` / `no_query` / `query_error` | Computed |
| `content_event_vendor` | Vendor extracted from filter fields | KQL filter-field analysis |
| `content_event_product` | Product extracted from filter fields | KQL filter-field analysis |
| `content_filter_fields` | Pipe-separated `Table.Field op "value"` clauses extracted from the query. Predicates on raw documented columns are attributed to the owning table; predicates on fields defined via `\| extend` use the synthetic table `_Computed`. | See [`map_solutions_connectors_tables.md` › Filter Fields Detection](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md#filter-fields-detection) |
| `associated_connectors` | Computed: connector IDs whose data matches this content's tables and filter fields (Standalone / GitHub Only only) | [Connector Association Algorithm](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md#connector-association-algorithm) |
| `associated_solutions` | Solutions of the associated connectors | Derived |
| `content_github_url` | GitHub URL (standalone items only) | Computed |
| `content_source` | `Solution` / `Standalone` / `GitHub Only` | File location + metadata presence |
| `metadata_source_kind` | `Community` / `Solution` / `Standalone` from YAML metadata | YAML `metadata.source.kind` |
| `metadata_author` | Author name | YAML `metadata.author` |
| `metadata_support_tier` | `Microsoft` / `Partner` / `Community` | YAML `metadata.support.tier` |
| `metadata_categories` | Categories/domains (comma-separated) | YAML `metadata.categories` |
| `not_in_solution_json` | `true` if found by file scan but not listed in Solution JSON (⚠️ in docs) | Comparison |
| `solution_name` | Parent solution name (empty for standalone) | Parent solution folder |
| `solution_folder` | Parent solution folder | File system |
| `solution_github_url` | GitHub URL of the solution | Computed |
| `is_published` | `true` if parent solution is published on Azure Marketplace | Marketplace API |

### Content source classification

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Solution** | Content shipped in a Solution package under `Solutions/` |
| **Standalone** | Top-level content with a YAML `metadata` section (community contributions) |
| **GitHub Only** | Top-level content without a `metadata` section (legacy / unclassified) |

## Related CSVs

- [`content_tables_mapping.csv`](content_tables_mapping.md) — content → table edges (with read/write annotation for playbooks).
- [`connectors.csv`](connectors.md) — for joining `associated_connectors`.
- [`asim_parsers.csv`](asim_parsers.md) — when a content item references an ASIM parser, the parser's filter fields are merged into the content item page's selection criteria.
